name: 32oz Glass Carafe with Lid - Threshold™: Dishwasher-Safe Juice Container, Traditional Style, Cold Beverage Server
description:
You’ll simply love serving drinks to family and friends with this 32-Ounce Glass Carafe with Lid from Threshold™. Featuring a slim silhouette and made with dishwasher-safe glass for lasting use, this carafe with lid is ideal for holding water, wine, juices and more. Featuring an embossed floral pattern on the outside for timeless flair, this clear glass carafe has a simple yet elegant look — simply fill with your favorite hot or cold beverage, then add matching tableware and mugs for a complete ensemble.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
